zh.title: 以太坊/美元技术分析：窄幅震荡偏弱整理
zh.content:
短线趋势呈窄幅震荡格局，价格围绕1580附近整理，上方受1586均线压制，下方1578支撑有效，整体动能偏弱多空拉锯明显延续

MACD指标小幅为正但动能有限，信号线缺失参考性弱，均线系统显示价格略低于20日线，趋势偏中性短期缺乏方向震荡延续为主局

下方关键支撑1578附近，若失守可能回踩1575甚至更低区域，上方1586为均线阻力，突破需放量确认短线关注区间突破信号

操作建议以区间交易为主，未突破前不宜追涨，可在1578-1586区间低吸高抛，止损设置在1575下方控制风险严格执行纪律

en.title: Ethereum vs US Dollar Technical Analysis
en.content:
ETH/USD is currently consolidating in a tight range around 1580, reflecting a neutral short-term structure after a modest 24h drift of 0.14%. Price action remains capped below the 20-period simple moving average at 1586, suggesting that bullish momentum is still weak. However, downside follow-through has also been limited, indicating equilibrium between buyers and sellers and a market waiting for a catalyst.

Momentum indicators paint an incomplete picture, with RSI(14) unavailable, limiting precise overbought or oversold assessment. The MACD reading at 3.34706 suggests mild positive momentum, but the absence of a signal line prevents confirmation of a clear crossover. Meanwhile, price trading slightly below the 20-day SMA reinforces a neutral-to-bearish bias, where rallies may face immediate resistance unless momentum strengthens decisively. Overall, momentum remains cautious and lacks strong directional conviction.

Immediate support for ETH/USD is forming near 1578–1575, which aligns with recent intraday lows and acts as the first defensive zone for buyers. A break below this area could expose a deeper support region around 1565, where prior consolidation occurred. On the upside, resistance is clustered at 1586 SMA and 1590, with stronger rejection likely unless volume expands. Market structure remains range-bound until a breakout occurs.

Trading conditions favor a range-bound strategy, with short-term traders potentially buying near support while targeting partial exits into resistance zones. Conservative positioning is advised given the lack of strong trend confirmation, with stops placed just below 1575 to manage downside risk. A breakout above 1590 would shift bias toward bullish continuation, while a breakdown under 1575 would signal renewed bearish pressure.
